body.question: What is the source for lighting Shabbat candles?

body.answer: The obligation to light Shabbat candles is derived from the Talmud in Tractate Shabbat 25b. The Gemara discusses how lighting candles ensures שלום בית (peace in the home) by providing light for the Shabbat meals. The Rambam codifies this in Hilchot Shabbat 5:1, stating it is a rabbinic obligation. The practice is also mentioned in the Shulchan Aruch, Orach Chaim 263:1-3, which details the proper time and method for lighting. See also the commentary of the Mishnah Berurah 263:1 for additional insights on the spiritual significance.
